commands.review_summary:
The branch adds Feishu post markdown newline normalization in `extensions/feishu/src/send.ts` and payload-builder tests for single, double, mixed, and fenced-code newlines.

PR surface: Source +17, Tests +40. Total +57 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main passes ordinary Feishu plain text through `sendMessageFeishu` into a post `md` element without newline normalization. I did not run or inspect a live Feishu client reproduction, so the rendered-output side still depends on the issue report and follow-up live proof.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review should wait for contributor live Feishu rendering proof; there is no narrow code repair for automation to perform from the current evidence.

target.title: fix(feishu): upgrade single newlines to double newlines for post+md rendering
target.body:
## Summary

Upgrade single newlines (`\n`) to double newlines (`\n\n`) in Feishu post+md messages so that multi-line text renders with proper paragraph breaks instead of appearing cramped.

Feishu's `post` + `tag: md` message format treats `\n` alone as a space (soft break), not a line break. Only `\n\n` (double newline) triggers a proper paragraph break. This causes all agent messages sent through the Feishu channel — both DM and group — to appear with text "mashed together" when the markdown output uses standard single-newline separators.

The fix adds `normalizeFeishuNewlines()` inside `buildFeishuPostMessagePayload()` so both `sendMessageFeishu` and `editMessageFeishu` paths benefit automatically. The function preserves existing `\n\n` sequences and fenced code blocks.

Fixes #97074

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)

**Behavior addressed**: Single `\n` in Feishu post+md messages is rendered as a space by the Feishu IM API. The fix upgrades `\n` to `\n\n` before the text is placed into the post message payload.

**Evidence type**: terminal

**Real setup tested**:
- **Runtime**: Node v24.13.1, Linux 4.19.112-2.el8.x86_64

**Exact steps or command run after fix**:

```bash
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/feishu/src/send.test.ts
```

**After-fix evidence**:

```
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  23 passed (23)
   Start at  02:25:16
   Duration  3.16s (transform 1.24s, setup 59ms, import 2.78s, tests 32ms, environment 0ms)
```

**Key normalization examples verified**:

| Input | After-fix output | Effect |
|-------|-----------------|--------|
| `"Hello\nWorld"` | `"Hello\n\nWorld"` | Single `\n` upgraded to `\n\n` |
| `"A\n\nB"` | `"A\n\nB"` | Existing `\n\n` preserved unchanged |
| `"A\nB\n\nC\nD"` | `"A\n\nB\n\nC\n\nD"` | Mixed newlines correctly handled |
| `"Before\n`\`\`\ncode\nblock\n`\`\`\nAfter"` | `"Before\n\n`\`\`\ncode\nblock\n`\`\`\n\nAfter"` | Fenced code blocks preserved |

**Observed result after the fix**: All 23 tests pass (19 pre-existing + 4 new tests covering the normalization behavior). The normalization function correctly handles single newlines, double newlines, mixed patterns, and fenced code blocks.

**What was not tested**: Live Feishu API send test (requires Feishu bot credentials and a live chat target). The fix is tested at the unit level against the post payload builder function (`buildFeishuPostMessagePayload`) which is the single point where `messageText` enters the Feishu post message structure.

## Tests and validation

| Test Type | Result | Details |
|-----------|--------|---------|
| Unit Tests | ✅ | 23/23 passed (19 existing + 4 new) |
| Feishu Extension Tests | ✅ | 963/964 passed (1 pre-existing failure in monitor.startup.test.ts) |
| Type Check | ✅ | All package-specific checks pass (npm shrinkwrap pre-existing failure unrelated) |
| Manual Verification | ✅ | 10 edge cases verified including empty string, trailing/leading newlines, triple newlines |

**New test cases added** (`extensions/feishu/src/send.test.ts`):
- Upgrades single `\n` to `\n\n` for paragraph breaks
- Preserves existing `\n\n` sequences unchanged
- Handles mixed single and double newlines
- Preserves newlines inside fenced code blocks

## Risk checklist

Did user-visible behavior change? (`Yes`)

Did config, environment, or migration behavior change? (`No`)

Did security, auth, secrets, network, or tool execution behavior change? (`No`)

What is the highest-risk area?
- Feishu message rendering: the normalization changes the text content of post+md messages. If the Feishu API changes its newline handling in the future, double-normalization could add extra blank lines.

How is that risk mitigated?
- The fix uses negative lookbehind/lookahead to only match single `\n` that are NOT part of `\n\n`, so existing paragraph breaks are never doubled
- Fenced code blocks are excluded from normalization via text splitting
- The change is scoped to `buildFeishuPostMessagePayload` only — Feishu Card messages and other channels are unaffected
- Removal of the `normalizeFeishuNewlines()` call reverts to original behavior

## Current review state

What is the next action?
- Maintainer review
